_doc: Layer inventory for the Relatedness Atlas. A 'layer' is a logical, in-memory shape that pages consume; a 'file' (see files.registry.json) is its on-disk source. Round 1 (2026-05-11) declares the five round-2 layers and their loaders; the runtime currently runs entirely off baked DEMO data in shared/demo_data.js, but the loaders in shared/loaders/ are wired and tested against the same schemas so the swap-in is a one-liner per page.

_tier_legend.hot: RAM-pinned at atlas_open; pages read directly; <1ms
_tier_legend.warm: IndexedDB-cached at trigger event; first read async ~50ms

res_pairwise._doc: ngsPedigree Stage 1 output. Drives the Inspector / Stats panel and the Network panel's edge classes.

family_hub_roster._doc: ngsPedigree Stage 1 output. Drives the Population Browser tree.

per_chrom_qc._doc: ngsPedigree Stage 2 output. Feeds the right-column Mendelian-check breakdown and the trio_qc map used by the Inversions page's four-stage scoring.

inversion_karyotypes._doc: Inversion Atlas catalogue export. Drives the Karyotypes tab, the Mendelian tester, and the four-stage scoring on the Inversions tab.

ancestry_q._doc: Optional. Drives the Karyotypes ancestry stripe. Falls back to the synthetic palette in shared/demo_data.js when absent.
